public.landingBadge: Digital menus for venues and branches
public.landingTitle: Browse public menus or manage your venue from one clean place.
public.landingBody: Wasla gives diners fast public menus and gives venue teams branch-scoped menu management, QR access, and analytics.
public.landingLivePreviewBody: Branch, call, WhatsApp, and map intents stay one tap away.
public.landingSectionMenusTitle: Guests can find the right branch before they even open a menu.
public.landingSectionMenusBody: The public search previews matching branches, then sends guests straight to the menu, maps, calls, or WhatsApp intent that fits the moment.
public.landingOwnerTitle: Make every scan, search, and visit lead to the next useful action.
public.landingOwnerBody: Set up venues, branches, menus, QR access, and analytics from the dashboard while guests browse from clean public pages.
public.landingOwnerQrBody: Each branch can route guests directly to its menu.
public.landingOwnerAnalyticsBody: Track views, scans, items, calls, maps, and WhatsApp clicks.
public.landingOwnerBranchesBody: Keep every branch discoverable under the right venue.
public.landingOwnerMenuBody: Dashboard previews and public menus use the same experience.
public.landingWowTitle: A QR scan becomes a beautiful branch menu in motion.
public.landingWowBody: Guests land on a polished menu, jump through categories, and choose the next action without feeling like they opened a static PDF.
public.quickAccessBody: Search venue names in any supported language, then filter by venue type.
public.quickSearchEmpty: No matching venues or menus yet.
public.chooseBranch: Choose the branch you want to browse.
public.footerRights: Wasla public menus. Built for faster venue discovery.
public.aboutBody: Wasla helps venues publish clean public menus for every branch while giving teams a focused dashboard for menu management, QR access, and analytics.
public.aboutNote: Our public pages are designed for guests first: fast browsing, clear branch context, and direct actions for maps, calls, and WhatsApp.
public.contactBody: Want to add your venue, ask about onboarding, or report something in a public menu? Reach the Wasla team from the dashboard contact flow or your onboarding channel.
public.contactNote: For now, venue teams can start by creating an account and adding their venue from the public landing page CTA.
public.privacyBody: Wasla keeps public menu browsing simple and uses analytics events to understand useful actions like views, QR scans, item views, calls, maps, and WhatsApp clicks.
public.privacyNote: Detailed legal privacy terms can be expanded later before launch with your final company policy and jurisdiction details.
public.termsBody: Wasla public pages are intended to help guests discover venues and menus. Venue teams are responsible for keeping menu content, prices, contact details, and branch information accurate.
public.termsNote: Detailed terms can be finalized before production launch with your business, payment, and support policies.

auth.registerSubtitle: Start with the owner account, then set up the venue.
auth.verifySubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code sent to the owner phone.
auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to manage your venue menu.

dashboard.venueSetupRequiredBody: Create the venue profile and default branch before using the dashboard.
dashboard.settingsControlsDepend: Settings controls depend on your role.
dashboard.accumulatedFromBranches: Accumulated from every branch with a menu.
dashboard.menuNeedsBranch: Menus are branch-scoped, so a branch is required before menu editing can begin.
dashboard.branchHasNoMenu: This branch has no menu yet.
dashboard.createMenuBeforeContent: Create a menu for the selected branch before adding categories, prices, items, QR, or public content.
dashboard.multiLabeledPricesBody: Use one price or up to 5 labeled prices.
dashboard.label: Label
dashboard.noItemsInCategory: No items in this category yet.
dashboard.categoryNeeded: A menu needs at least one category before items can be added.
dashboard.itemsCreatedUnderCategory: Items are created under a selected category and can use one or multiple labeled prices.
dashboard.noMenuItemsToRank: No menu items to rank yet.
dashboard.qrNeedsMenuBody: Create a menu for the selected branch before generating or sharing its QR code.
dashboard.qrDescription: Branded QR for this branch menu. Use it on table tents, posters, receipts, and social links.
dashboard.qrDownloadFailed: Could not download the QR asset. Please refresh and try again.
dashboard.qrCopyFailed: Could not copy the QR link.
dashboard.profileSettingsBody: Keep owner contact details tidy so account recovery and team workflows stay smooth.
dashboard.name: Name
dashboard.passwordSettingsBody: Update your password with a fresh secure value for this dashboard account.
dashboard.venueSettingsBody: Review the public business details used across branches, QR assets, and menu pages.
dashboard.teamSettingsBody: Invite staff and control which branches they can manage from the dashboard.
dashboard.searchUsers: Search users by name, phone, email, or role
dashboard.branchAssignmentRequired: Staff users must be assigned to at least one branch.
dashboard.deleteUserBody: Delete {name} from this venue? This removes their dashboard access.
dashboard.assignUserToBranch: Assign every new user to at least one branch.
dashboard.supportSettingsBody: Find account help, policies, and current verification status in one place.
dashboard.noBranchAccessBody: Your account is active, but it is not assigned to any branch yet. Ask the venue owner or manager to assign a branch before opening the dashboard.
dashboard.previewBody: Browse categories, open an item for image and details, and choose the right option without cart steps.
dashboard.noPublicMenuBody: The selected preview branch does not have a menu to show.
dashboard.extractionLimitSummary: {remaining}/{total} extractions left this month - up to {images} images
dashboard.tooManyExtractionImages: Select up to {count} images for this plan.
dashboard.deleteItemWarning: Are you sure you want to delete this item?
dashboard.deleteCategoryWarning: Are you sure you want to delete this category?
dashboard.deleteMenuWarning: Are you sure you want to delete this menu?
dashboard.deleteBranchWarning: Are you sure you want to delete this branch?
dashboard.deleteVenueWarning: Are you sure you want to delete this venue?
dashboard.deleteTeamWarning: Are you sure you want to delete this team?
dashboard.deleteUserWarning: Are you sure you want to delete this user?

subscription.currentPlanBody: Public menus stay available across every plan. Workspace changes, AI extraction, analytics history, and QR branding follow the active plan limits.
subscription.pastDueBanner: Billing is past due. Menu links remain online, but changes and downloads are paused.
subscription.ownerOnlyBilling: Owners manage billing and upgrades. You can still review limits and plan availability here.

admin.title: Subscription dashboard
admin.body: Monitor subscription health, manage venue plans, and maintain the live plan catalog from one scalable admin area.

restricted.title: Platform admin only
restricted.body: This portal manages venue subscriptions and plan mappings across Wasla.

home.quickActionsBody: Each area owns one workflow so the subscription console can grow without getting crowded.

actions.venuesBody: Change plans, statuses, and renewal dates for venues.
actions.matrixBody: Edit limits and gate values across plans.
actions.plansBody: Update plan names, prices, states, and assigned features.

expiring.title: Expiring soon
expiring.empty: No paid venues expire in the next 14 days.

venueCrm.title: Venue CRM
venueCrm.body: Search, review usage shape, and force plan changes.

matrix.title: Dynamic plan-feature matrix
matrix.body: Edits here update backend gates immediately after the next API request.
matrix.empty: No feature mappings are available yet.

plans.title: Plan management
plans.body: Edit the customer-facing plan catalog and control which features belong to each plan.
